Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPDRGA ;DALOI/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform ;10/01/17 15:30 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ;;Per VHA Directive 2004-038, this routine should not be modified. ; ; External References DBIA# ; ------------------- ----- ; DVPUTL ; DVPXUTL ; PSOORRL 2400 ; RX^PSO52API 4820 ; PSS431^PSS55 4826 ; DATA^PSS50 4533 ; GET4LST^ORWORR 3367 Q ; GETDRGS(TARGET,REPTYPE,MODE,MEDID,SMRY) ; Get Patient Meds ; REPTYPE: "MS"= Medication Statement "MR"=Medication request ; MODE: "S"=SEARCH "R"= READ ; MEDID: The external medicationId (with ICN) when doing a READ ; Default to last 30 years N DUZ,ROOT S (DUZ,DUZ(2))=1 ;this needs to be removed once we use SAML to log in (and have a DUZ) S SDATE=$$FMADD^XLFDT(DT,-10950),EDATE=DT K ^TMP("PS",$J) D OCL^PSOORRL(DFN,SDATE,EDATE,"") N ITMP,FIELDS,INSTRUCT,COMMENTS,REASON,NVSDT,TYPE,ILST,J,DVPOCL,FOUND,TTFOUND S (TTFOUND,ILST)=0 S DVPOCL=$NA(^TMP($J,"DVPOCL")) K @DVPOCL M @DVPOCL=^TMP("PS",$J) K ^TMP("PS",$J) S FOUND=0,ITMP="" F S ITMP=$O(@DVPOCL@(ITMP)) Q:'ITMP D . S ROOT=$NA(@TARGET@("results",ITMP)) . I MODE="R" D . . N DVPID S DVPID=+$P(@DVPOCL@(ITMP,0),U) . . S:DVPID=$P(MEDID,":",6) (TTFOUND,FOUND)=1 . I (MODE="S")!(FOUND=1) D . . K INSTRUCT,COMMENTS,REASON S FOUND=0 . . K ^TMP("DVPACT",$J,"COMMENTS") . . S COMMENTS="^TMP(""DVPACT"",$J,""COMMENTS"")" . . S (INSTRUCT,@COMMENTS)="",FIELDS=@DVPOCL@(ITMP,0) . . S TYPE=$S($P($P(FIELDS,U),";",2)="O":"OP",1:"UD") . . I $D(@DVPOCL@(ITMP,"CLINIC",0)) S TYPE="CP" . . N LOC,LOCEX S (LOC,LOCEX)="" . . I TYPE="CP" S LOC=$G(@DVPOCL@(ITMP,"CLINIC",0)) . . S:LOC LOCEX=$P($G(^SC(+LOC,0)),U)_":"_+LOC ;IMO NEW . . I TYPE="OP",$P(FIELDS,";")["N" S TYPE="NV" . . I TYPE="OP",$P(FIELDS,";")["P" S TYPE="OO" ; Pending Outpatient Order . . I TYPE="UD",$P(FIELDS,";")["P" S TYPE="IO" ; Pending Inpatient Order . . I $O(@DVPOCL@(ITMP,"A",0))>0 S TYPE="IV" . . I $O(@DVPOCL@(ITMP,"B",0))>0 S TYPE="IV" . . I ((TYPE="UD")!(TYPE="CP")) D UDINST(.INSTRUCT,ITMP,.DVPOCL,LOCEX),SETPID^DVPDRGB(ITMP),SETID^DVPDRGB . . I TYPE="OP" D OPINST(.INSTRUCT,ITMP,.DVPOCL,SDATE,EDATE,DFN),SETPID^DVPDRGB(ITMP),SETID^DVPDRGB . . I REPTYPE="MR",TYPE="IV" D IVINST(.INSTRUCT,ITMP,.DVPOCL),SETPID^DVPDRGB(ITMP),SETID^DVPDRGB . . I TYPE="NV" D NVINST(.INSTRUCT,ITMP,.DVPOCL),SETPID^DVPDRGB(ITMP),SETID^DVPDRGB . . I REPTYPE="MR",TYPE="OO" D POINST(.INSTRUCT,ITMP,.DVPOCL),SETPID^DVPDRGB(ITMP),SETID^DVPDRGB . . I REPTYPE="MR",TYPE="IO" D PIINST(.INSTRUCT,ITMP,.DVPOCL),SETPID^DVPDRGB(ITMP),SETID^DVPDRGB I MODE="R",TTFOUND=0 D . N MEDSFX S MEDSFX=$S(REPTYPE="MS":"Statement",1:"Request") . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","not-found","MSG_NO_MATCH","No Medication "_MEDSFX_" found for medication"_MEDSFX_"Id: "_$P(MEDID,":",6),"GETDRGS^DVPDRGA") K ^TMP("PS",$J),^TMP("DVPACT",$J),^TMP($J,"DVPOCL"),^TMP("PS",$J),^TMP($J,"RX52"),^TMP($J,"DRUG") Q ; UDINST(Y,INDEX,DVPOCL,LOCEX) ; assembles instructions for a unit dose order N I,X,RST,UDIEN,UDUID,RESNM S X=@DVPOCL@(INDEX,0) S UDIEN=+$P(X,U) S UDUID=$$SETUID^DVPXUTL(DVPSTN,DFN,UDIEN,"55UD") S RESNM=$S(REPTYPE="MR":"Request",REPTYPE="MS":"Statement") S USUIDEXT=$$SETUID^DVPXUTL("medication"_RESNM,ICN,UDIEN,"unit-dose") S XX="usual^^http://lighthouse.va.gov/identifiers/vista/ien^"_USUIDEXT N IDENT D IDENT^DVPXUTL(.IDENT,XX) M @ROOT@("identifier")=IDENT I 'SMRY S @ROOT@("category")="inpatient" I LOCEX]"" S @ROOT@("location")=LOCEX D SETZERO^DVPDRGB(X,"unitDose",UDUID) D SETMULT^DVPDRGB(.DVPOCL,INDEX,"unitDose",UDUID) ; assembles start date and reasons for a Unit Dose med N IFNLST,UDLST,UDSDT I +$P(X,U,8) S IFNLST(1)=+$P(X,U,8) D GET4V11^ORWORR(.UDLST,2,0,.IFNLST) I $D(UDLST(1)) D . S UDSDT=$P(UDLST(1),U,3) . I +$P(UDLST(1),U,4) S @ROOT@("authoredOn")=$P(UDLST(1),U,4)_U_$$FMTE^XLFDT($P(UDLST(1),U,4)) . N IX S IX=1 F S IX=$O(UDLST(IX)) Q:IX="" D . . I 'SMRY,$G(UDLST(IX))]"" S @ROOT@("note",IX-1)=$E(UDLST(IX),2,999) . I 'SMRY,+$P(UDLST(1),U,10) D PROVIDER^DVPDRGB(+$P(UDLST(1),U,10),$TR(UDUID,":","-"),"orderingProvider","unitDose",INDEX) . D PSDRUG^DVPDRGB($P(X,U,2),INDEX,UDIEN_",") ; taken I REPTYPE="MS" D . N ARY S @ROOT@("taken")=$$TAKEN^DVPDRGB(.ARY,UDIEN_"U") . I 'SMRY,$D(ARY)>0,@ROOT@("taken")'="y" M @ROOT@("reasonNotTaken")=ARY ; intent I 'SMRY,REPTYPE="MR" S @ROOT@("intent")="instance-order" Q ; OPINST(Y,INDEX,DVPOCL,SDATE,EDATE,DFN) ; assembles instructions for an outpatient prescription N I,X,RST,RXIEN,SIG,SPINST,ROUTE,SCHED,DRUG,RXDAT,FILE,FLDNAME,RXUID,RESNM S X=@DVPOCL@(INDEX,0) S RXIEN=+$P(X,U) S RXUID=$$SETUID^DVPXUTL(DVPSTN,DFN,RXIEN,"52") S RESNM=$S(REPTYPE="MR":"Request",REPTYPE="MS":"Statement") S RXUIDEXT=$$SETUID^DVPXUTL("medication"_RESNM,ICN,RXIEN,"out-patient") D SETZERO^DVPDRGB(X,"outpatient",RXUID) S XX="usual^^http://lighthouse.va.gov/identifiers/vista/ien^"_RXUIDEXT N IDENT D IDENT^DVPXUTL(.IDENT,XX) M @ROOT@("identifier")=IDENT I 'SMRY S @ROOT@("category")="outpatient" D SETMULT^DVPDRGB(.DVPOCL,INDEX,"outpatient",RXUID) D RX^PSO52API(DFN,"RX52",RXIEN,"","",SDATE,EDATE) S RXDAT=$NA(^TMP($J,"RX52")),FILE=52 S RXIEN=0 F S RXIEN=$O(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN)) Q:'RXIEN D . N FLD S FLD="" F S FLD=$O(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD)) Q:FLD="" D . . I $D(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD))=1 D Q . . . ; Get Drug specific fields . . . I FLD=6 D PSDRUG^DVPDRGB($P(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD),U,2)) . . . S FLDNAME=$$GETFLD^DVPUTL(FILE,FLD) . . . I FLDNAME]"#" S FLDNAME=$REPLACE(FLDNAME,"#",$S($E(FLDNAME,1)="#":"NUMBER ",1:" NUMBER ")) . . . S FLDNAME=$TR(FLDNAME,"-_/"," ") . . . S FLDNAME=$$CONVERT^DVPUTL(FLDNAME) . . . I REPTYPE="MS",FLDNAME="issueDate",@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD)]"" S @ROOT@("dateAsserted")=$$FHIRDTTM^DVPXUTL($P(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD),U)) . . . I FLDNAME="status",@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD)]"" S @ROOT@(FLDNAME)=$S($P(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD),U,2)]"":$P(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD),U,2),1:@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD)) . . . I REPTYPE="MS",FLDNAME="dispensedDate",@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD)]"" S @ROOT@("effective")=$$FHIRDTTM^DVPXUTL(($P(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD),U))) . . . I REPTYPE="MR" D . . . . I FLDNAME="fillDate",@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD)]"" S @ROOT@("authoredOn")=$$FHIRDTTM^DVPXUTL(($P(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD),U))) . . . . I FLDNAME="qty",@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD)]"" S @ROOT@("dispenseRequest","quantity")=$P(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD),U) . . . . I FLDNAME="numberOfRefills",@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD)]"" S @ROOT@("dispenseRequest","numberOfRepeatsAllowed")=$P(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD),U) . . . . I FLDNAME="daysSupply",@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD)]"" S @ROOT@("dispenseRequest","supplyDuration")=$P(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD),U) . . . . I FLDNAME="expirationDate",@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD)]"" S @ROOT@("dispenseRequest","expiresOn")=$$FHIRDTTM^DVPXUTL($P(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD),U)) . . . ; Get Provider details . . . I 'SMRY,FLDNAME["provider"!(FLDNAME["Provider"),@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD)]"" D . . . . N PRC D FHIRPRC^DVPXUTL(.PRC,$P(@RXDAT@(DFN,RXIEN,FLD),U)) . . . . I $D(PRC)>0 M @ROOT@("recorder")=PRC ;taken I REPTYPE="MS" S @ROOT@("taken")="unk" ; intent I 'SMRY,REPTYPE="MR" S @ROOT@("intent")="order" Q ; IVINST(Y,INDEX,DVPOCL) ; assembles instructions for an IV order N SOLN1,I,RST,IVDUR,CNT,IVIEN,IVUID,RESNM S IVDUR="" S X=@DVPOCL@(INDEX,0) S IVIEN=+$P(X,U) S IVUID=$$SETUID^DVPXUTL(DVPSTN,DFN,IVIEN,"55IV") S RESNM=$S(REPTYPE="MR":"Request",REPTYPE="MS":"Statement") S IVUIDEXT=$$SETUID^DVPXUTL("medication"_RESNM,ICN,IVIEN,"iv") S XX="usual^^http://lighthouse.va.gov/identifiers/vista/ien^"_IVUIDEXT N IDENT D IDENT^DVPXUTL(.IDENT,XX) M @ROOT@("identifier")=IDENT I 'SMRY S @ROOT@("category")="inpatient" D SETZERO^DVPDRGB(X,"iv",IVUID) D SETMULT^DVPDRGB(.DVPOCL,INDEX,"iv",IVUID) S:$D(@DVPOCL@(INDEX,"IVLIM",0)) IVDUR=$G(@DVPOCL@(INDEX,"IVLIM",0)) I 'SMRY,$L(IVDUR) D . N DURU,DURV,RTMP S DURU="",DURV=0 . S RTMP=$NA(@ROOT@("dosageInstructions","maxDosePerAdministration")) . I IVDUR["dose" D Q . . ; doses . . S DURV=$P(IVDUR,"doses",2) . . S @RTMP@("value")=DURV,@RTMP@("unit")="dose" . S DURU=$E(IVDUR,1),DURV=$E(IVDUR,2,$L(IVDUR)) . S @ROOT@("dosageInstructions","dose","doseQuantity","value")=DURV . I (DURU="D")!(DURU="d") S @RTMP@("unit")="day" . I (DURU="H")!(DURU="h") S @RTMP@("unit")="hour" . I (DURU="M")!(DURU="m") S @RTMP@("unit")="ml" . I (DURU="L")!(DURU="l") S @RTMP@("unit")="L" ; priority S IVIDFM=IVIEN_"," I 'SMRY,REPTYPE="MR",$$GET1^DIQ(52.41,IVIDFM,25)'="" S @ROOT@("priority")=$$GET1^DIQ(52.41,IVIDFM,25) ; assembles start date and reasons for a IV med N IFNLST,IVLST,IVSDT I +$P(X,U,8) S IFNLST(1)=+$P(X,U,8) D GET4V11^ORWORR(.IVLST,2,0,.IFNLST) I $D(IVLST(1)) D . S IVSDT=$P(IVLST(1),U,3) . I +$P(IVLST(1),U,4) S @ROOT@("authoredOn")=$$FHIRDTTM^DVPXUTL($P(IVLST(1),U,4)) . N IX S IX=1 F S IX=$O(IVLST(IX)) Q:IX="" D . . I 'SMRY,$G(IVLST(IX))]"" S @ROOT@("note",IX-1)=$E(IVLST(IX),2,999) . I 'SMRY,+$P(IVLST(1),U,10) D PROVIDER^DVPDRGB(+$P(IVLST(1),U,10),IVUID,"orderingProvider","iv",INDEX) . D PSDRUG^DVPDRGB($P(X,U,2),INDEX,IVIDFM) ; taken I REPTYPE="MS" D . N ARY S @ROOT@("taken")=$$TAKEN^DVPDRGB(.ARY,IVIEN_"V") . I 'SMRY,$D(ARY)>0,@ROOT@("taken")'="y" M @ROOT@("reasonNotTaken")=ARY ; intent I 'SMRY,REPTYPE="MR" S @ROOT@("intent")="instance-order" Q ; NVINST(Y,INDEX,DVPOCL) ; assembles instructions for a non-VA med N I,X,RST,RXUID,NVAID,NVUID,DRUG,RESNM S X=@DVPOCL@(INDEX,0) S NVAID=+$P(X,U) S NVUID=$$SETUID^DVPXUTL(DVPSTN,DFN,NVAID,"55NVA") S RESNM=$S(REPTYPE="MR":"Request",REPTYPE="MS":"Statement") S NVUIDEXT=$$SETUID^DVPXUTL("medication"_RESNM,ICN,NVAID,"non-va") S XX="usual^^http://lighthouse.va.gov/identifiers/vista/ien^"_NVUIDEXT N IDENT D IDENT^DVPXUTL(.IDENT,XX) M @ROOT@("identifier")=IDENT I 'SMRY S @ROOT@("category")="nonVa" D SETZERO^DVPDRGB(X,"nonVA",NVUID) ; assembles start date and reasons for a non-VA med N IFNLST,NVALST I +$P(X,U,8) S IFNLST(1)=+$P(X,U,8) D GET4V11^ORWORR(.NVALST,2,0,.IFNLST) I $D(NVALST(1)) D . S NVSDT=$P(NVALST(1),U,3) . I +$P(NVALST(1),U,4) S @ROOT@("dateAsserted")=$$FHIRDTTM^DVPXUTL($P(NVALST(1),U,4)) . I 'SMRY,+$P(NVALST(1),U,10) D PROVIDER^DVPDRGB(+$P(NVALST(1),U,10),$TR(NVUID,":","-"),"orderingProvider","nonVA",INDEX) . D SETMULT^DVPDRGB(.DVPOCL,INDEX,"nonVA",NVUID) . D PSDRUG^DVPDRGB($P(X,U,2),INDEX,NVAID_",") ; taken I REPTYPE="MS" S @ROOT@("taken")="unk" ; intent I 'SMRY,REPTYPE="MR" S @ROOT@("intent")="order" Q ; POINST(Y,INDEX,DVPOCL) ; assembles instructions for a Pending Outpatient Order med N I,X,RST,RXUID,POID,POUID,DRUG,ARRAY,POIDFM,RESNM S X=@DVPOCL@(INDEX,0) S POID=+$P(X,U) S POUID=$$SETUID^DVPXUTL(DVPSTN,DFN,POID,"52.41") S RESNM=$S(REPTYPE="MR":"Request",REPTYPE="MS":"Statement") S POUIDEXT=$$SETUID^DVPXUTL("medication"_RESNM,ICN,POID,"out-patient") S XX="usual^^http://lighthouse.va.gov/identifiers/vista/ien^"_POUIDEXT N IDENT D IDENT^DVPXUTL(.IDENT,XX) M @ROOT@("identifier")=IDENT I 'SMRY S @ROOT@("category")="outpatient" D SETZERO^DVPDRGB(X,"pendingOutpatientOrder",POUID) S POIDFM=POID_"," I 'SMRY,REPTYPE="MR",$$GET1^DIQ(52.41,POIDFM,25)'="" S @ROOT@("priority")=$$GET1^DIQ(52.41,POIDFM,25) N RSN S RSN=$$GET1^DIQ(52.41,POIDFM,22) I RSN'="" S @ROOT@("reasonCode")=RSN N PPRESC S PPRESC=$$GET1^DIQ(52.41,POIDFM,22.1) I PPRESC'="" S @ROOT@("priorPrescription")=$$SETUID^DVPXUTL("medicationRequest",ICN,PPRESC) ; assembles start date and reasons for a Pending Outpatient med N IFNLST,POLST,POSDT I +$P(X,U,8) S IFNLST(1)=+$P(X,U,8) D GET4V11^ORWORR(.POLST,2,0,.IFNLST) I $D(POLST(1)) D . S POSDT=$P(POLST(1),U,3) . I +POSDT S @ROOT@("authoredOn")=$$FHIRDTTM^DVPXUTL(POSDT) . I 'SMRY,POLST(3)]"" S @ROOT@("note",1)=$E(POLST(3),2,999) . I 'SMRY,+$P(POLST(1),U,10) D PROVIDER^DVPDRGB(+$P(POLST(1),U,10),POUID,"orderingProvider","pendingOutpatientOrder",INDEX) . D SETMULT^DVPDRGB(.DVPOCL,INDEX,"pendingOutpatientOrder",POUID) . S @ROOT@("dispenceRequest","numberOfRepeatsAllowed")=$$GET1^DIQ(52.41,POID_",",13) . S @ROOT@("dispenceRequest","expectedSupplyDuration")=$$GET1^DIQ(52.41,POID_",",101) . S @ROOT@("dispenceRequest","quantity")=$$GET1^DIQ(52.41,POID_",",12) . D PSDRUG^DVPDRGB($P(X,U,2),INDEX,POIDFM) ; intent I 'SMRY S @ROOT@("intent")="order" Q ; PIINST(Y,INDEX,DVPOCL) ; assembles instructions for a Pending Inpatient Order med N I,X,RST,PIID,PIUID,DRUG,RESNM S X=@DVPOCL@(INDEX,0) S PIID=+$P(X,U) S PIUID=$$SETUID^DVPXUTL(DVPSTN,DFN,PIID,"53.1") S RESNM=$S(REPTYPE="MR":"Request",REPTYPE="MS":"Statement") S PIUIDEXT=$$SETUID^DVPXUTL("medication"_RESNM,ICN,PIID,"in-patient") S XX="usual^^http://lighthouse.va.gov/identifiers/vista/ien^"_PIUIDEXT N IDENT D IDENT^DVPXUTL(.IDENT,XX) M @ROOT@("identifier")=IDENT I 'SMRY S @ROOT@("category")="inpatient" S PIIDFM=PIID_"," I 'SMRY,REPTYPE="MR",$$GET1^DIQ(53.1,PIIDFM,.24)'="" S @ROOT@("priority")=$$GET1^DIQ(53.1,PIIDFM,.24) D SETZERO^DVPDRGB(X,"pendingInpatientOrder",PIUID) ; assembles start date and reasons for a Pending Inpatient med N IFNLST,PILST,PISDT I +$P(X,U,8) S IFNLST(1)=+$P(X,U,8) D GET4V11^ORWORR(.PILST,2,0,.IFNLST) I $D(PILST(1)) D . S PISDT=$P(PILST(1),U,3) . S @ROOT@("authoredOn")=$$FHIRDTTM^DVPXUTL(PISDT) . I 'SMRY D . . N RTMP S RTMP=$NA(@ROOT@("dispenseRequest","validityPeriod")) . . I +$P(PILST(1),U,4) S @RTMP@("start")=$$FHIRDTTM^DVPXUTL($P(PILST(1),U,4)) . . I +$P(PILST(1),U,5) S @RTMP@("end")=$$FHIRDTTM^DVPXUTL($P(PILST(1),U,5)) . . I PILST(3)]"" S @ROOT@("note",1)=$E(PILST(3),2,999) . . I +$P(PILST(1),U,10) D PROVIDER^DVPDRGB(+$P(PILST(1),U,10),PIUID,"provider","pendingInpatientOrder",INDEX) . D SETMULT^DVPDRGB(.DVPOCL,INDEX,"pendingInpatientOrder",PIUID) . D PSDRUG^DVPDRGB($P(X,U,2),INDEX,PIIDFM) ; intent I 'SMRY S @ROOT@("intent")="order" Q
